reasoning: As of early May 2025, there is no evidence that Uber operates in the Turks and Caicos Islands, nor are there any announcements of an impending launch. The forecast date is less than two months away from the resolution date. The local regulatory environment appears highly protective of the traditional taxi industry, as evidenced by recent warnings against "illegal taxis" and the failure of a previous local ride-sharing attempt (Conch Cab). Given the lack of infrastructure, the entrenched taxi monopoly, and the absence of any PR or regulatory changes indicating a launch, it is extremely unlikely Uber will become available by July 1, 2025.
batch_queries: Will Uber be available in the Turks and Caicos Islands on July 1, 2025?
